en: And it's another beautiful day in paradise folks, but don't forget to buckle up out there in Radioland
ko: 오늘도 천국 같은 아름다운 날이지만, 라디오랜드에서는 안전벨트를 매는 걸 잊지 마세요.

en: The lawyer will be on you in about 90 seconds.
Pops, make sure the coffee's hot.
Okay, he's making his turn onto Lancaster Square.
ko: 좋아, 이제 랜카스터 스퀘어로 방향을 틀고 있어.

en: Oh my god! He knew he was in Radioland!
ko: 오 마이 갓! 그는 자신이 라디오랜드에 있다는 걸 알았어!

en: Sorry about that folks, I guess we picked up a police frequency or something.
It sometimes happens and it can drive you crazy.
ko: 가끔 이런 일이 발생할 수 있고, 정말 미칠 것 같아요.

en: Okay, it's classical climb back in here.
